bead.title: Story 16.3: Specs + cross-cutting e2e + raw-transcript-viewed audit even: part 1
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Parent bead ddx-b4c5151a is too broad for one execution pass. This child owns part 1 of 2 of that parent scope.

ROOT CAUSE
PROBLEM
Parent bead ddx-70a432b5 is too broad for one execution pass. This child owns part 3 of 3 of that parent scope.

ROOT CAUSE
PROBLEM
FEAT-008, FEAT-010, and FEAT-019 specs are missing the documentation sections required to make the Story-16 run-detail page and its evidence browser official. Without spec updates, the run-detail page, trust boundary statement, and raw-transcript audit event are undocumented platform behaviors.

ROOT CAUSE
- docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-008-*.md: missing a Run-detail-page subsection describing the trust boundary ('Anyone with project read access sees raw prompts, responses, stderr, tool args') and evidence browser whitelist (allowed extensions + 64KB cap).
- docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-010-*.md: Run resolver contract does not include prompt, response, stderr, toolCalls(first, after), bundleFiles[], bundleFile(path) with bundle-root confinement, or normalized ToolCallEntry.
- docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-019-*.md: review surface does not point to /runs/[runId] deep page.
- No 'raw transcript viewed' audit event exists in the server or schema.
- Depends on ddx-f04faa86 (16.1 page) and ddx-4cd64068 (16.2 evidence tab).

PROPOSED FIX
- Update FEAT-008: add Run-detail-page subsection with trust-boundary statement + evidence whitelist (*.txt, *.md, manifest.json, prompt.md, result.json, files < 64KB; no Markdown rendering in evidence tab).
- Update FEAT-010: extend Run resolver contract with prompt, response, stderr, toolCalls(first, after), bundleFiles[], bundleFile(path) with bundle-root confinement; document normalized ToolCallEntry as canonical store populated at drain.
- Update FEAT-019: review surface section updated to link to /runs/[runId] deep page.
- Add 'raw transcript viewed' audit event in server (emitted on prompt/response/transcript access).
- Add cross-cutting e2e: full prompt/response/tool-trace/evidence-list end-to-end via Playwright.

NON-SCOPE
- Frontend implementation (that is Story 16.1 and 16.2).
- New auth or role-based access control beyond what the trust boundary statement documents.

PROPOSED FIX
Implement only this child acceptance slice:
- p95 dataset (200 tool calls, 30 evidence files) all tabs render and become interactive within one render frame.
- bun run test:e2e green.
- lefthook run pre-commit passes.

NON-SCOPE
Do not implement parent acceptance criteria assigned to sibling
...[truncated]

PROPOSED FIX
Implement only this child acceptance slice:
- p95 dataset (200 tool calls, 30 evidence files) all tabs render and become interactive within one render frame.
- bun run test:e2e green.

NON-SCOPE
Do not implement parent acceptance criteria assigned to sibling child beads. Preserve every parent non-scope constraint unless this child explicitly narrows it.
bead.acceptance:
1. p95 dataset (200 tool calls, 30 evidence files) all tabs render and become interactive within one render frame.
2. bun run test:e2e green.

events.body: {"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"ambiguous_scope: The bead is not safely refinable as-is because it mixes multiple independent workstreams (spec/documentation updates, server-side audit event, and cross-cutting e2e coverage) and contains conflicting/duplicated parent scope language (ddx-b4c5151a vs ddx-70a432b5, part 1 of 2 vs part 3 of 3). Rewriting would require choosing which scope statements to trust and potentially changing acceptance criteria, so operator confirmation is needed.","fingerprint":"4a4c61c4c495026c402b5fc3d74cf2535cc4223730d9e55d287891592f499c0c","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"readiness_best_effort","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.readiness_best_effort","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment"}

{"rationale":"The bead is not lint-ready: the title is not imperative or subsystem-scoped, the description is internally repetitive/truncated and lacks file:line-backed root cause, the acceptance criteria are not tied to named tests or a unique go test filter, required verification commands are missing, labels do not cover area/kind/cross-reference facets, deps are neither listed nor stated as No deps, and the scope bundles multiple independent changes that should be split.","score":0,"suggested_fixes":["Rewrite the title as an imperative, subsystem-specific one-line scope.","Replace the description with a single coherent PROBLEM / ROOT CAUSE (with file:line where applicable) / PROPOSED FIX / NON-SCOPE block.","Split the bundled work into separate beads for spec updates, audit-event plumbing, and e2e coverage if they remain independently executable.","Add acceptance criteria that name specific Test* symbols or a unique go test -run filter, plus a wired assertion for the introduced code path.","Include both `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./\u003cpkg\u003e/...` and `lefthook run pre-commit` in acceptance.","Update labels to include phase, area, kind, and a cross-reference facet.","Add a `deps` field or explicitly state `No deps.`"],"waivers_applied":[]}

{"ac_map":[{"parent_ac":"p95 dataset (200 tool calls, 30 evidence files) all tabs render and become interactive within one render frame.","coverage":"covered by child 1: Story 16.3: Specs + cross-cutting e2e + raw-transcript-viewed audit even: part 1"},{"parent_ac":"bun run test:e2e green.","coverage":"covered by child 2: Story 16.3: Specs + cross-cutting e2e + raw-transcript-viewed audit even: part 2"}],"child_ids":["ddx-5bad54ca","ddx-73749d13"],"rationale":"deterministic fallback split after agent decomposer returned empty output"}

{"rationale":"2/8 checks pass: the bead has an explicit parent and deps, and the description contains the required high-level PROBLEM/ROOT CAUSE/PROPOSED FIX/NON-SCOPE structure. The rest is not lint-ready: the title is not imperative/specific, acceptance lacks named tests and the required `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./\u003cpkg\u003e/...` + `lefthook run pre-commit` gates, labels are missing `area` and `kind`, and the scope is too muddled for a clean sub-agent prompt.","score":2,"suggested_fixes":["Rewrite the title as an imperative, subsystem-specific action, not a story fragment.","Collapse the description into one clear PROBLEM / ROOT CAUSE / PROPOSED FIX / NON-SCOPE block and add concrete file:line anchors where the spec gaps live.","Replace the acceptance criteria with numbered, verifiable checks that name `Test*` symbols or a unique `go test -run` filter, plus `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./\u003cpkg\u003e/...` and `lefthook run pre-commit`.","Add explicit `area:*` and `kind:*` labels; keep `story:16` or similar cross-reference labeling, but do not rely on it to satisfy the missing facets.","Split the mixed spec/docs/e2e/audit work into smaller child beads unless this bead can be narrowed to one bounded implementation slice."],"waivers_applied":[]}
